member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.Api.JhooseController
member.summary: API controller providing access to security headers, including Content Security Policy (CSP) and Permissions Policy.
member.param: The provider for Content Security Policy headers.
The repository for accessing security settings.
The provider for response headers.
The provider for permissions policy headers.
The cache manager for caching headers and settings.
The logger for logging errors and information.

member.summary: Represents a request for header information containing a nonce value.

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Cache.EpiserverCacheManager
member.summary: An implementation of that utilizes Episerver's synchronized object instance cache for caching operations.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Cache.EpiserverCacheManager.#ctor(EPiServer.Framework.Cache.ISynchronizedObjectInstanceCache)
member.summary: An implementation of that utilizes Episerver's synchronized object instance cache for caching operations.

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Cache.ICacheManager
member.summary: Defines a contract for managing cached data with support for insertion, retrieval, and removal operations.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Cache.ICacheManager.Insert(System.String,System.Object,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Inserts an object into the cache with a specified key and duration.
member.param: The unique identifier for the cached item.
The object to be cached.
The time span for which the item should remain in the cache.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Cache.ICacheManager.Get``1(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a cached item by its key.
member.typeparam: The type of the cached object, which must be a reference type.
member.param: The unique identifier for the cached item.
member.returns: The cached object of type , or null if the key is not found.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Cache.ICacheManager.Get``1(System.String,System.Func{``0},System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Retrieves a cached item by its key, or generates and caches the value if it doesn't exist.
member.typeparam: The type of the cached object, which must be a reference type.
member.param: The unique identifier for the cached item.
A function that generates the value to be cached if it's not found.
The time span for which the item should remain in the cache.
member.returns: The cached or newly generated object of type .

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Cache.ICacheManager.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a cached item by its key.
member.param: The unique identifier for the cached item to be removed.

Service to send webhook notifications.

Service to send webhook notifications.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Controllers.NotificationBaseController.NotifyWebhooks
member.summary: Notifies configured webhook URLs using the webhook notifications service.

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Services.IJhooseSecurityService
member.summary: Defines a service for applying security-related HTTP headers to responses.
member.remarks: This service provides methods to add various security headers including Content Security Policy (CSP), Permissions Policy, and other security-related HTTP headers to enhance application security.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Services.IJhooseSecurityService.AddContentSecurityPolicy(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpResponse)
member.summary: Adds the Content Security Policy (CSP) header to the specified HTTP response.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Services.IJhooseSecurityService.AddPermissionsPolicy(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpResponse)
member.summary: Adds the Permissions Policy header to the specified HTTP response.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Services.IJhooseSecurityService.AddHeaders(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpResponse)
member.summary: Adds other security-related headers to the specified HTTP response.

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Services.JhooseSecurityService
member.summary: Service responsible for managing and applying security headers to HTTP responses, including Content Security Policy (CSP), custom response headers, and Permissions-Policy headers.
member.remarks: This service integrates with caching mechanisms to optimize header retrieval and applies security headers to outgoing HTTP responses. It handles CSP directives with nonce generation, custom security headers, and browser permissions policies while avoiding conflicts with existing headers.

member.summary: Service responsible for managing and applying security headers to HTTP responses, including Content Security Policy (CSP), custom response headers, and Permissions-Policy headers.
member.remarks: This service integrates with caching mechanisms to optimize header retrieval and applies security headers to outgoing HTTP responses. It handles CSP directives with nonce generation, custom security headers, and browser permissions policies while avoiding conflicts with existing headers.

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Webhooks.DefaultWebhookNotifications
member.summary: Provides default implementation for webhook notifications that posts to specified endpoints asynchronously.
member.param: Factory for creating service scopes to resolve dependencies within the async task.
Logger instance for logging errors that occur during webhook notification.
member.remarks: This class creates a fire-and-forget task that posts empty content to all provided webhook endpoints. Errors during notification are logged but do not throw exceptions to the caller. Each notification request uses an HTTP client configured with the name "webhooks".

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Webhooks.DefaultWebhookNotifications.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceScopeFactory,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Webhooks.DefaultWebhookNotifications})
member.summary: Provides default implementation for webhook notifications that posts to specified endpoints asynchronously.
member.param: Factory for creating service scopes to resolve dependencies within the async task.
Logger instance for logging errors that occur during webhook notification.
member.remarks: This class creates a fire-and-forget task that posts empty content to all provided webhook endpoints. Errors during notification are logged but do not throw exceptions to the caller. Each notification request uses an HTTP client configured with the name "webhooks".

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Webhooks.IWebhookNotifications
member.summary: Defines a contract for sending webhook notifications to registered endpoints.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Core.Webhooks.IWebhookNotifications.Notify(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Uri})
member.summary: Sends notifications to the specified list of webhook endpoints.
member.param: A list of URIs representing the webhook endpoints to notify.

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.ResponseHeaders.Repository.FixResponseHeaderHelper
member.summary: Helper class to fix response headers deserialization issues. This is necessary because of a bug intriduced in V2.5 see https://github.com/andrewmarkham/contentsecuritypolicy/issues/145

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.ResponseHeaders.Repository.FixResponseHeaderHelper.IsFixRequired(Jhoose.Security.Features.ResponseHeaders.Models.ResponseHeader,System.String)
member.summary: Determines if a fix is required based on the type name.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.ResponseHeaders.Repository.FixResponseHeaderHelper.ApplyFix(Jhoose.Security.Features.ResponseHeaders.Models.ResponseHeader,System.String)
member.summary: Fixes the response type based on the original header name.

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Features.Settings.Controllers.SettingsController
member.summary: API controller to manage Jhoose security settings, response headers, policy imports/exports and webhook notifications.
member.param: Repository for managing CSP settings.
Service used to send webhook notifications.
Service to perform import and export operations.
Repository to persist and retrieve import records.
Logger instance for the controller.

member.summary: API controller to manage Jhoose security settings, response headers, policy imports/exports and webhook notifications.
member.param: Repository for managing CSP settings.
Service used to send webhook notifications.
Service to perform import and export operations.
Repository to persist and retrieve import records.
Logger instance for the controller.

member.summary: Gets the CSP settings.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Settings.Controllers.SettingsController.Settings(Jhoose.Security.Features.Settings.Models.CspSettings)
member.summary: Updates the CSP settings.
member.param: The CSP settings to update.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Settings.Controllers.SettingsController.Export(Jhoose.Security.Features.ImportExport.Models.ExportOptions)
member.summary: Exports selected CSP policies, response headers, and settings according to the provided options.
member.param: Options specifying which parts of the configuration to include in the export.
member.returns: An export object containing the requested configuration data.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Features.Settings.Controllers.SettingsController.UploadImport(Jhoose.Security.Features.ImportExport.Models.JhoooseSecurityExport)
member.summary: Uploads an exported configuration package and persists it to the import repository.
member.param: The exported configuration data to save; if null a BadRequest is returned.
member.returns: Returns 204 No Content on success or 400 Bad Request if the export is null.

member.summary: Used for the report-uri directive

member.summary: Used by the report-to directive

member.summary: Urls that will be triggered when the settings change

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Helpers.ObjectHasher
member.summary: Provides functionality to compute a hash for an object.

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Helpers.ObjectHasher.ComputeHash(System.Object)
member.summary: Computes a SHA256 hash for the given object.
member.param: The object to hash.
member.returns: Hexadecimal string representation of the hash.

member.name: T:Jhoose.Security.Helpers.SpanHelpers
member.summary: Span-based helper methods for high-performance string processing in CSP contexts

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Helpers.SpanHelpers.IsUrlDomainAllowed(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char},System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Efficiently checks if a URL domain matches any of the allowed domains using Span
member.param: The URL to check
Comma-separated list of allowed domains
member.returns: True if the URL domain is allowed

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Helpers.SpanHelpers.ExtractDomainFromUrl(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Extracts the domain portion from a URL using Span for performance
member.param: The URL to parse
member.returns: The domain portion of the URL

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Helpers.SpanHelpers.ProcessCspDirectiveValue(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Efficiently processes CSP directive values by removing unnecessary whitespace
member.param: The directive value to process

member.name: M:Jhoose.Security.Helpers.SpanHelpers.IsValidNonceFormat(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Validates if a nonce value has the correct format using Span operations
member.param: The nonce value to validate
member.returns: True if the nonce format is valid
